div.p: ABULJADYEL SKY Holding is the parent holding company of Abdullatif H. Abuljadayel & Sons, serving as a strategic platform for managing and developing a diverse portfolio of companies across investment, real estate, industry, and technology. Its subsidiaries include Secure Growth, SKY Details, Abdullatif H. Abuljadayel & Sons Co., ALAJCHEM Factory, and Cloud System. The holding company focuses on sustainable growth, value creation, and providing strategic support to ensure each subsidiary remains a leader and innovator in its sector.
Established in 1984 single-handed by Sheik Abdullatif H. Abuljadayel It was started by acquiring worldwide known brands, HACH-For Water Quality.
SKY Details is a real estate company specializing in property management and providing comprehensive solutions for investors and clients.

Cloud Systems for IT is a Saudi company under Abuljadyel Sky Holding, featuring a team of professional engineers, consultants, and experts in IT, digital transformation, ERP systems, and software development.

Cloud Systems for IT is a Saudi company under Abuljadyel Sky Holding, featuring a team of professional engineers, consultants, and experts in IT, digital transformation, ERP systems, and software development.

ABULJADYEL SKY Holding is the parent holding company of Abdullatif H. Abuljadayel & Sons, serving as a strategic platform for managing and developing a diverse portfolio of companies across investment, real estate, industry, and technology. Its subsidiaries include Secure Growth, SKY Details, Abdullatif H. Abuljadayel & Sons Co., ALAJCHEM Factory, and Cloud System. The holding company focuses on sustainable growth, value creation, and providing strategic support to ensure each subsidiary remains a leader and innovator in its sector.
Established in 1984 single-handed by Sheik Abdullatif H. Abuljadayel It was started by acquiring worldwide known brands, HACH-For Water Quality.
SKY Details is a real estate company specializing in property management and providing comprehensive solutions for investors and clients.
Cloud Systems for IT is a Saudi company under Abuljadyel Sky Holding, featuring a team of professional engineers, consultants, and experts in IT, digital transformation.
